name: Jake's Corner Party
runner_note: Cold towels, beer, and a cowbell. Find us on the corner.
crew_note: Parking on S. Pitt St. Ring doorbell for access.

name: The Taco Temple
runner_note: We have a taco-themed photo booth and shots of hot sauce. Yes, literal hot sauce shots.
crew_note: Free parking in driveway + street. Family friendly.

name: Mile 14 Margaritas
runner_note: Frozen margaritas, Baja Blast flavor available. You've earned this.
crew_note: Parking garage on N. Nash St. 3 blocks from party.

name: The Dog Petting Zone
runner_note: 6 very good dogs who want to support your dreams. Also gummy bears.
crew_note: Columbia Heights Metro. No parking — take the train.

name: Union Station Rally
runner_note: Last party before the Final Push. Medical available. You can do this.
crew_note: Union Station parking. Full medical kit on site.
